title: HeheGamingAndy's Veinminer
description: 'HeheGamingAndy's Veinminer' is a datapack which allows you to veinmine (break every ore next to the one you broke with your pickaxe) in the newest 1.21 Vanilla version and above.
body:
'HeheGamingAndy's Veinminer' is a datapack which allows you to veinmine (break every ore next to the one you broke with your pickaxe) in the newest 1.21 Vanilla version and above.

Version 1.0 adds:
- Players can veinmine with every pickaxe available in the game
- The block limit for a vein is 500 blocks
- Damage to pickaxe when veinmining is 5 (Work in progress, will do a percentage damage in the future)

This datapack is compatible only for Minecraft 1.21 and above!
This datapack is Multiplayer-compatible!
If you are using the datapack in a video, make sure to credit the work I did! :)
If there are bugs and glitches found in the datapack, press the 'Report issues' , which will redirect you here: hehegamingandy38.wixsite.com/mydatapacks/report-bug or contact me on Discord(@hehegamingandy)!
Hope you enjoy it!
